payload: {id:'mJ84P77h6g',cs:50,ce:[[,,,,,,,,],[,,,,,,,,],[,,,,,,,,],[,,,,,,,,],[,,,,,,,,],[,,,,,,,,],[,,,,,,,,],[,,,,,,,,],[,,,,,,,,]],re:[[[0,0],[0,1],[0,2],[1,0],[1,1],[1,2],[2,0],[2,1],[2,2]],[[0,3],[0,4],[0,5],[1,3],[1,4],[1,5],[2,3],[2,4],[2,5]],[[0,6],[0,7],[0,8],[1,6],[1,7],[1,8],[2,6],[2,7],[2,8]],[[3,0],[3,1],[3,2],[4,0],[4,1],[4,2],[5,0],[5,1],[5,2]],[[3,3],[3,4],[3,5],[4,3],[4,4],[4,5],[5,3],[5,4],[5,5]],[[3,6],[3,7],[3,8],[4,6],[4,7],[4,8],[5,6],[5,7],[5,8]],[[6,0],[6,1],[6,2],[7,0],[7,1],[7,2],[8,0],[8,1],[8,2]],[[6,3],[6,4],[6,5],[7,3],[7,4],[7,5],[8,3],[8,4],[8,5]],[[6,6],[6,7],[6,8],[7,6],[7,7],[7,8],[8,6],[8,7],[8,8]]],ca:[{v:'title: And Then There Were None'},{v:'author: fjam'},{v:'rules: Detective, after bad weather we have finally been able reach the island following the distress call. Though we are yet to identify each victim, it appears that all ten digits died in accordance with the following verse:\\n  Ten little digits sat down to dine; One was evenly spread in a sandwich and then there were nine.\\n Nine little digits under white cliffs slept late; One was crushed by stones and then there were eight.\\n Eight little digits heard whispers of heaven; One collapsed in the crossing and then there were seven.\\n Seven little digits cut up renban sticks; One chopped itself symmetrically and then there were six.\\n Six little digits played with bows and knives; An arrow tip pierced one and then there were five.\\n Five little digits were tried under law; One was shot for different parity and then there were four.\\n Four little digits took a trip out to sea; A red herring swallowed one and then there were three.\\n Three little digits got stuck together with glue; One was squashed between the others and then there were two.\\n Two little digits lay under the sun; One melted at peak temperature and then there was one.\\n One little digit with nowhere to run; Oddly still killed and then there were none.\\n  We have also found a note, where one unidentified digit confesses to the murder of the other nine. We believe you should be able to solve the mystery by filling in the grid legitimately with the nine victims, leaving out the murderer. A few extra details from the note: Normal sudoku variant rules apply. Sandwich crusts have been marked with thin rectangles and contain the highest and lowest digits in the grid. Each line of the rhyme refers only to the remaining digits. Some victims have been identified by cages in the grid.'},{ce:[[3,7]],v:''},{ce:[[7,8]],v:''},{ce:[[5,5]],v:''},{ce:[[7,1]],v:''},{v:'solution: 540893261192506438638421590083954612254168903961032854416389025309245186825610349'}],l:[{wp:[[8.5,5.5],[8.5,4.5],[7.5,3.5],[6.5,3.5],[7.5,4.5],[7.5,5.5]],c:CFCFCF,th:21},{wp:[[2.2,6.8],[1.5,7.5],[0.8,8.2]],c:CFCFCF,th:2},{wp:[[4.5,2.5],[3.5,3.5],[2.5,4.5],[2.5,5.5],[3.5,6.5]],c:E6261F,th:8},{wp:[[2.5,2.5],[3.5,3.5],[4.5,4.5],[4.5,5.5],[3.5,6.5]],c:E6261F,th:8},{wp:[[6.5,1.5],[7.5,1.5],[8.5,1.5]],c:D23BE7,th:13},{wp:[[0.5,1.5],[1.5,1.5],[2.5,1.5],[3.5,1.5]],c:A3E048,th:10},{wp:[[1.5,0.5],[1.5,1.5],[1.5,2.5]],c:A3E048,th:10}],a:[{wp:[[5.5,1.9],[5.5,2.5],[5.5,3.5],[5.5,4.5],[5.5,5.5]],c:CFCFCF,th:5,hl:0.3}],u:[{ct:[8.5,5.5],w:0.85,h:0.85,c1:CFCFCF,c2:CFCFCF,r:t},{ct:[3.5,7.5],w:0.7,h:0.7,c1:CFCFCF,c2:CFCFCF,r:t},{ct:[0.5,3.5],w:0.7,h:0.7,c1:CFCFCF,c2:CFCFCF,r:f}],o:[{ct:[5.5,1.5],w:0.83,h:0.83,c1:CFCFCF,c2:#F,r:t,fs:16,te:''},{ct:[7,8.5],w:0.3,h:0.3,c1:#0,c2:#F,r:t,fs:12,te:''},{ct:[6,8.5],w:0.3,h:0.3,c1:#0,c2:#F,r:t,fs:12,te:''},{ct:[5,8.5],w:0.3,h:0.3,c1:#0,c2:#F,r:t,fs:12,te:''},{ct:[4,8.5],w:0.3,h:0.3,c1:#0,c2:#F,r:t,fs:12,te:''},{ct:[2.5,6.5],w:0.8,h:0.8,c1:CFCFCF,c2:#F,r:t,fs:16,te:''},{ct:[0.5,8.5],w:0.8,h:0.8,c1:CFCFCF,c2:#F,r:t,fs:16,te:''},{ct:[0.5,2.5],w:0.15,h:0.75,c1:#0,c2:#F,r:f,fs:12,te:''},{ct:[0.5,4.5],w:0.15,h:0.75,c1:#0,c2:#F,r:f,fs:12,te:''}],vd:[{id:'PnWctUoudKk',publishedAt:'2023-04-01T19:30:03Z',t:'And Then There Were None by Agatha \'fjam\' Christie',d:0}]}
